comment_text:
Dear Netflix Team, 
My name is Sameer, and I’m a huge fan of Netflix! I truly enjoy your platform—the variety of content, shows, and movies you offer is exceptional. I especially love watching international shows in Hindi; the dubbed versions make the experience so much more enjoyable, and I appreciate the effort you put into this..
I wanted to share a small suggestion that could further improve the user experience. Currently, the available audio and subtitle languages for a show or movie are only visible to the user after clicking the play button. It would be incredibly helpful if this information—like the number of languages or a specific list—could be displayed on the detail page itself before playback, allowing users to decide more easily. Additionally, I’ve noticed that some newly released shows don’t have Hindi dubbing at launch but get it added later. However, there’s no clear notification when this happens, so it’s hard to know when a title becomes available in Hindi. Including a section like “Available Languages” or a note about recently added languages on the detail page would make a big difference.. 
This is just a small idea to enhance an already amazing platform. I absolutely love Netflix and always look forward to your new releases. Keep up the fantastic work!

Thanks and Regards 
Sameer Shaikh.
